name: unity
description: Operate Unity 6 through Unity's native MCP relay with inspected, reversible, and verified editor changes.

companion.title: Enable Unity's native MCP relay
companion.summary: Use Unity 6's AI Assistant package and local relay; do not install a community Python bridge.
steps: Open a Unity 6 project with the AI Assistant package installed. Go to Edit → Project Settings → AI → Unity MCP Server and confirm Unity Bridge is Running.
Set UNITY_MCP_RELAY in Artyx to the platform-specific relay executable installed under ~/.unity/relay/, then reconnect. Keep --mcp as the relay argument.
In Unity's Pending Connections, review and Accept Artyx. Confirm the client appears under Connected Clients, then ask it to summarize console warnings.
prerequisites: Unity 6 (6000.0)+ with the com.unity.ai.assistant package installed.
An active Unity AI trial or subscription and the project requirements documented by Unity.
